title: astragalus lucidus
intro: Astragalus lucidus, also known as Huang Qi, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus lucidus include enhancing immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus lucidus can be prepared into various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
